ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter state code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, Southeast, Midwest) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "state_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (population per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the data is recorded */,
  "disposable_income_millions" REAL /* Disposable personal income in millions of dollars */,
  "per_capita_disposable_income" REAL /* Per capita disposable personal income */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year to which the economic data corresponds */,
  "gdp_millions" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product in millions of dollars */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate as a percentage */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate as a percentage */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "additional_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each additional dataset */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the data is recorded */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., employment rate, cost of living) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the dataset value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_additional_datasets_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., economist, policy analyst, public) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., economic, demographic, policy) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the report */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* The type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
